overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night and entering a Japanese-inspired restaurant. The player explores the dining area with red paper lanterns and continues into the back kitchen spaces.

blue glowing vending machine with digital display
distinctive pink-leaved tree visible against the buildings
elevated walkway connecting buildings above the street
tall glass and steel building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a wet cyberpunk city street at night, illuminated by neon signs. The Caravan restaurant sign is visible ahead, with a distinctive pink tree and towering skyscrapers in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: restaurant entrance with outdoor counter seating

events.description: entering the restaurant from the outdoor street
moving from neon exterior lighting to dimmer interior red lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the restaurant entrance, passing the front counter with patrons

person in white shirt and red cap standing near the entrance

entered.detail: long counter with green stools where patrons sit
bright green plastic bar stools lined up at the counter
decorative folding screen with geometric gold pattern
traditional red Chinese lanterns hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters the restaurant, passing an outdoor counter where patrons sit on green stools. The lighting shifts from bright neon to dimmer red tones as they move through wooden lattice screens toward the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: casual dining room with red lanterns and plastic furniture

events.description: turning to approach a woman standing near the back wall
turning away and moving toward the back kitchen area

agents.ego_description: walking through the dining area, observing patrons and approaching a woman standing by a table near the dragon mural

notable_agents.action: woman in dark outfit standing by a table looking around
man in suit sitting at a table near the lattice screen

entered.detail: simple white plastic dining tables throughout the room
red plastic chairs paired with the white tables
large wall with red dragon graffiti and Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The player explores the main dining room illuminated by red paper lanterns, navigating between white plastic tables and red chairs. A woman stands prominently near the back wall featuring a large red dragon mural, while other patrons sit at tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: back kitchen and food preparation area

events.description: entering the back kitchen area from the dining room
entering the steamy back room with green fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: moving through the back kitchen area, passing the service counter and entering the steamy prep room with industrial equipment

notable_agents.action: chef in white uniform working at the kitchen prep station

entered.detail: long counter with green stools for kitchen staff
tall metal racks holding kitchen supplies and equipment
large ventilation hood over the cooking area
dark green door at the back of the kitchen
vents emitting steam and mist into the back room

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the dining area into the back kitchen spaces, passing metal shelving and industrial cooking equipment. The environment becomes steamy and dimly lit with green fluorescent lights as they approach the back storage area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit city street into the dim, industrial depths of a Japanese-inspired restaurant. It begins with a walk along a wet pavement under towering skyscrapers and glowing signs, moving toward the distinctive pink tree of the Caravan restaurant. As the camera enters the establishment, the bright city lights fade into dimmer red tones, passing an outdoor counter with green stools and wooden lattice screens. The scene then opens into a main dining room illuminated by red paper lanterns and a large dragon mural, navigating past white plastic tables and patrons before turning toward the rear of the building. Finally, the environment shifts from the warm dining area into the steamy, dimly lit kitchen spaces, passing metal shelving and industrial equipment under a green fluorescent glow.
